text.title: ads-meta-targeting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-meta-targeting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Layering 4+ interest and behavior dimensions on a small-country audience.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The resulting audience may be too small for efficient delivery. Meta requires sufficient scale to find the right users at competitive auction prices.
